category_sources: Official rust-lang.org describes Rust as a language for reliable and efficient software.
source_facts.description identifies Rust as a safe, concurrent, practical language.
docs_sources: Official Rust Learn page links to primary Rust learning documentation.
Official Rust documentation is hosted at doc.rust-lang.org.
repo_sources: Official rust-lang GitHub organization pins rust-lang/rust as the Rust repository.
source_facts.repo is empty, so official source-control repository was determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables include rustc, cargo, rustdoc, rustfmt, and clippy tools.
